testcase.name: validate register link
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › report.spec.ts:10:1 › validate register link ────────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('.ico-register') Expected: visible Received: undefined Timeout: 5000ms
